name: @kampus/cf-credentials
description: The shared macOS-Keychain Cloudflare-credential seam — paste-token → validate-before-persist → Keychain, keychain-first with $CLOUDFLARE_* env fallback (#1730, ADR 0045). Extracted from cf-utils so every CF operator CLI (cf-utils, orphan-sweep, anka-ops) depends on one auth package instead of relocating into cf-utils.
